series_metadata.series_title: Cash Journal for Completed Elevator Insp
series_metadata.series_description: File contains name of payee, amount paid, payee address and any other related information.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years in operating area, or until audited by State Auditor and report is released, then transfer to appropriate off site storage facility for 10 years, then destroy., Paper: Shred
